name: Teller
description: MCP server for Teller - the API for US bank accounts. Fetch accounts, balances, transactions, account/routing numbers, identity, and beta payments. Self-serve signup with a free dev tier (100 live connections + unlimited sandbox). Teller development and production require a mutual-TLS client certificate; provide the certificate and private key fields for live access.

credential_fields.name: username
credential_fields.label: Access Token
credential_fields.description: Teller access_token returned by Teller Connect (token_xxx). Sent as the username in HTTP Basic auth.

credential_fields.name: password
credential_fields.label: Password
credential_fields.description: Teller uses Basic auth with the access token as the username and ignores the password. Enter the literal value 'x' — the runtime needs a non-empty password to build the Basic header.

credential_fields.name: client_certificate_pem
credential_fields.label: Client Certificate PEM
credential_fields.description: Teller mTLS client certificate PEM. Required for development and production access; optional in sandbox.

credential_fields.name: client_private_key_pem
credential_fields.label: Client Private Key PEM
credential_fields.description: Private key PEM for the Teller mTLS client certificate. Required for development and production access; optional in sandbox.

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List all bank accounts linked to the access token. Returns account id, name, type, subtype, last-four, currency, and institution.

tools.name: get_account
tools.description: Get a single linked bank account by account id.

tools.name: delete_account
tools.description: Disconnect a linked bank account, revoking access for the access token.

tools.name: get_account_details
tools.description: Get the account and routing numbers for a linked account (for ACH transfers).

tools.name: get_account_balances
tools.description: Get the ledger and available balances for a linked account.

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List transactions for a linked account, newest first. Returns amount, date, description, running balance, and enriched merchant/category details. Use from_id for cursor pagination.

from_id.description: Return transactions older than this transaction id (cursor pagination)

start_date.description: Filter transactions on or after this ISO date, for example 2026-01-01.

end_date.description: Filter transactions on or before this ISO date, for example 2026-01-31.

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Get a single transaction for a linked account by transaction id.

tools.name: get_identity
tools.description: Get account-holder identity information (names, and where available emails, phone numbers, addresses) for all accounts linked to the access token.

tools.name: create_payee
tools.description: Create a Teller beta payment payee for an account, currently used for Zelle payments where supported. If Teller returns connect_token, the user must complete MFA in Teller Connect before the payee is saved.

scheme.description: Payment scheme. Teller currently documents zelle.

address.description: Payee email address or phone number.

tools.name: create_payment
tools.description: Initiate a Teller beta payment from an account to a saved payee. The payments API is beta and availability depends on institution support.

amount.description: Payment amount as a decimal string, for example 10.48.

tools.name: list_payments
tools.description: List Teller beta payments initiated through the API for one account.

tools.name: get_payment
tools.description: Get one Teller beta payment by ID.
